commands.review_summary:
The PR migrates MSTeams conversation references and poll metadata/votes from plugin-local JSON files to plugin-state SQLite, with one-time legacy JSON import/removal and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +462, Tests +394. Total +856 across 18 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a refactor PR rather than a bug report. Source review confirms current main uses JSON stores while the PR adds SQLite migration and regression tests for the changed behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human maintainer review is needed because the PR has the protected maintainer label and changes MSTeams persisted session state with upgrade/live-tenant acceptance risk; there is no narrow automated repair to make.

target.title: refactor(msteams): persist conversation and poll stores in sqlite
target.body:
## Summary
- Move MSTeams conversation references and poll metadata/votes from plugin-local JSON files into plugin-state SQLite.
- Import legacy `msteams-conversations.json` and `msteams-polls.json` once without overwriting existing SQLite state; remove imported JSON files after successful migration.
- Hash external Teams conversation IDs for plugin-state keys, shard poll votes into bounded rows, and keep poll bucket caps below the plugin-state per-plugin row cap with prune headroom.
- Leave MSTeams SSO/delegated token stores unchanged.

## Verification
- `pnpm test extensions/msteams/src/conversation-store.shared.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/conversation-store-state.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/polls.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/pending-uploads-fs.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/send-context.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/graph-messages.read.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/graph-group-management.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/outbound.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/monitor.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/monitor.lifecycle.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm test extensions/msteams/src/conversation-store-state.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/conversation-store.shared.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/polls.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm tsgo:prod`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --blacksmith-org openclaw --blacksmith-workflow .github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml --blacksmith-job check --blacksmith-ref main --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`
- Autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: MSTeams conversation and poll plugin-local JSON stores now persist through plugin-state SQLite while SSO/delegated token stores remain file-backed.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout plus Blacksmith Testbox Linux runner.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Focused MSTeams Vitest files, `pnpm tsgo:prod`, autoreview, and Blacksmith Testbox `pnpm check:changed`.
Evidence after fix: Focused MSTeams tests passed, `tsgo:prod` passed, autoreview reported no actionable findings, and Testbox `tbx_01ksx3q6ek3tm3vy68jvhsbssd` passed `pnpm check:changed` before the final rebase onto current main; refreshed PR CI is running on the pushed head.
Observed result after fix: Legacy JSON imports are idempotent, existing SQLite rows win, long Teams conversation IDs are stored behind hashed plugin-state keys, and poll votes remain sharded within plugin-state row limits.
What was not tested: Live MSTeams tenant traffic; SSO/delegated token migration intentionally not changed.
target.author: steipete
